testcase.name: Header ID Generation - London School TDD > ID Generation from Titles > should convert "Text & Content" to "text-content"
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > ID Generation from Titles > should convert "Interactive Forms" to "interactive-forms"
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > ID Generation from Titles > should handle numbers: "Section 1" → "section-1"
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > ID Generation from Titles > should remove special chars: "What's New?" → "whats-new"
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > ID Generation from Titles > should handle Unicode: "Café & Bar" → "cafe-bar"
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Explicit ID Preservation > should use explicit id when provided
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Explicit ID Preservation > should not modify explicit id
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Explicit ID Preservation > should prefer explicit id over generated
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Edge Cases > should handle empty title (use fallback)
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Edge Cases > should handle very long titles (truncate)
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Edge Cases > should handle only special chars "!!!" → fallback
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Edge Cases > should handle whitespace-only title
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Edge Cases > should handle duplicate titles (add suffix)
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Header Rendering > should render h1 with generated id
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Header Rendering > should render h2 with explicit id
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Header Rendering > should render h3 with title and generated id
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Header Rendering > all header levels h1-h6 should get IDs
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Integration with DynamicPageRenderer > should render header from component config
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Integration with DynamicPageRenderer > should work with multiple headers on page
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Integration with DynamicPageRenderer > should work with sidebar navigation
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Collaborator Contracts > should define clear generateHeaderId contract
Header ID Generation - London School TDD > Collaborator Contracts > should verify Header component accepts correct props interface
